description_long: This is a black, cylindrical frying pan with a smooth, unadorned exterior and a single, straight handle extending from one side. The pan's body appears deep and robust, likely made from metal, with a uniform matte or semi-gloss finish. The handle is slender, straight, and seamlessly attached to the pan, without any visible ergonomic shaping or grip texture. The rim of the pan is straight and moderately thick, lacking any flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges. There are no visible brand logos, decorative elements, or hanging holes on the handle. The bottom of the pan is not fully visible, but it appears smooth and unmarked, without any special patterns or ridges.
description: A deep, black metal frying pan with a straight, simple handle and a smooth, unadorned finish. The pan has a cylindrical shape and no visible logos or hanging holes.
description_view_0: The pan is shown from a side angle, clearly displaying the straight handle extending to the right and the cylindrical body.
description_view_1: The pan is viewed from the front, showing the open circular top and the absence of the handle from this perspective.
description_view_2: The pan is seen from the opposite side, with the handle extending to the left and the cylindrical body visible.
description_view_3: The pan is viewed from the back, with the handle pointing directly toward the viewer and the open top visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, cylindrical metal handle with no visible grip texture or ergonomic shaping; not detachable.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, moderately thick rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth and unmarked, with no visible patterns, ridges, or stamps.
